outcome_contract.why: Process-improvements pages are the operator's daily work surface. Currently passive report feel â€” stale counts, internal jargon, flat lists â€” undermines daily use. Pages need accurate live state and a command-centre look to be genuinely useful.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Redesigned `/process-improvements/*` pages with: (a) zero data-accuracy regressions on the 5 identified bugs, (b) scoped dark command-centre visual theme, (c) spatial dashboard layout with urgency-tiered sections, and (d) all internal-system copy replaced with operator-facing plain language.

engineering_coverage.applicable: P1: minimal; P2: new CSS utilities + wrapper class + hero re-skin; P3: full swimlane layout + sub-nav upgrade
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: All DS atoms inherit `.cmd-centre` overrides automatically

engineering_coverage.applicable: All states (loading, empty, error, pending, bulk-select, snooze-picker) re-skinned in P2; new swimlane empty states added in P3
N/A â€” internal operator tool; no auth changes; no PII
N/A â€” no changes to decision ledger or API routes
P1: regression assertions for B1â€“B5; P2: snapshot updates; P3: snapshot updates + smoke test of all triage actions
engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: TASK-01, TASK-02, TASK-03, TASK-05, TASK-07, TASK-08

engineering_coverage.applicable: P1: `initialInProgressCount` removed from `NewIdeasInboxProps`; `InboxSection` gains explicit `count` prop; `InProgressInbox` type assertion expanded
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No lib-layer changes; all changes in page/component layer

engineering_coverage.applicable: Sub-nav poll adds one `useEffect` + `fetch` on mount (same endpoint as existing polls). Zero additional overhead otherwise.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Sub-nav poll must fail silently if API unavailable

engineering_coverage.applicable: Three independently revertable commit sets (one per phase). Production Workers deployment â€” each phase must pass full CI before considered stable.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: `git revert <phase-commit>` is full rollback per phase

stage_payload.summary: The `/process-improvements/new-ideas` and `/process-improvements/in-progress` pages are the operator's daily triage surface. This plan delivers a three-phase upgrade: Phase 1 fixes 4 confirmed data-accuracy bugs (B1: stale initialInProgressCount prop; B2: hardcoded zero in ProcessImprovementsSummary; B4: SSR-locked newIdeasCount badge; B5: internal copy labels) plus one code-quality hardening change (B3: explicit count prop on InboxSection â€” current children-length works for existing call sites but is brittle); Phase 2 installs a scoped dark command-centre visual theme using `.cmd-centre` CSS
goals: Fix confirmed data-accuracy bugs B1, B2, B4, B5; add explicit `count` prop to `InboxSection` (B3 code quality improvement â€” current children-length derivation works for existing `.map()` call sites but is brittle for future uses).
Apply scoped dark command-centre theme (navy/indigo palette) without affecting rest of BOS.
Restructure both pages to urgency-tiered spatial dashboards with live large-number stats.
Replace all internal-system copy in operator-facing elements with plain-language labels.
Convert sub-nav to live-count polling component.
constraints: Tailwind v4 `@theme inline` pattern; no hardcoded hex values in className strings.
New CSS custom properties defined in `apps/business-os/src/styles/global.css` only â€” not in `packages/themes/`.
DS component API (Button, Tag, etc.) for interactive controls; no changes to DS package code.
`pnpm typecheck` must pass after Phase 1 before Phase 2 begins.
assumptions: DS atoms resolve `hsl(var(--color-*))` and will inherit `.cmd-centre` scope overrides automatically.
`isActiveNow` (5-min file-mtime window) is honest enough for "Running Now" labelling.
selected_approach: What was chosen: Three-phase sequential with scoped CSS class approach and client-side count derivation. Sub-nav independently polls the same endpoint on mount.

Why planning is not reopening option selection: All approaches compared in analysis with explicit elimination rationale. Option A is the only one achieving all goals while keeping each phase independently safe. Sub-option choice (A1 vs A2, D1 vs D2) closed in analysis with evidence.

plan_gates.Auto-build eligible: Yes â€” Waves 1â€“5 (TASK-01 through TASK-09 except TASK-07) are all â‰Ą80% confidence. TASK-07 (75%) is gated behind TASK-06 CHECKPOINT where `/lp-do-replan` will decompose or raise it before execution. Build can start on Wave 1 today.

task_briefs.title: Fix B1+B2+B3 â€” Remove `initialInProgressCount`, derive counts, fix `InboxSection`
Fix B4 â€” Live `newIdeasCount` in In Progress page
Dark Theme CSS â€” `.cmd-centre` + `bg-cmd-hero` + Glow Utilities + Hero Re-skin
New Ideas Page â€” Urgency Swimlanes + Live-Stat Hero Strip
In Progress Page â€” Sectioned List + Live-Stat Hero Strip
Sub-Nav Upgrade â€” Live Counts + Pulse Dot

areas.label: **New Ideas page**
areas.flow: (1) SSR renders projection + active plans; (2) hero strip shows Inbox/InProgress/Overdue stats (initially SSR-derived, updating client-side via auto-refresh); (3) urgency swimlanes render: Overdue danger strip â†’ Operator Actions section â†’ Ideas Queue section â†’ Deferred (collapsed) â†’ Done timeline (collapsed); (4) auto-refresh (30s) updates all counts and swimlane contents
areas.seams: If swimlane categorisation has edge cases, empty-state fallback shows "Nothing here" within each section

areas.label: **In Progress page**
areas.flow: (1) SSR renders active plans; (2) hero strip shows InProgress + NewIdeas counts (client-side via badges); (3) three sections render: Running Now (isActiveNow, animated ring) â†’ Blocked (tasksBlocked > 0) â†’ In Progress (remaining); (4) auto-refresh (30s) updates counts and section membership
areas.seams: `InProgressCountBadge` already wired (pre-existing); `LiveNewIdeasCount` badge wired in TASK-02

areas.label: **Sub-navigation**
areas.flow: (1) SubNav component mounts; (2) `useEffect` fires `fetch("/api/process-improvements/items")`; (3) counts computed: `newIdeasCount` from items + inProgressDispatchIds, `inProgressCount` from activePlans; (4) tabs show `Inbox (N)` and `In Progress (N)`; (5) pulse dot shown when any plan `isActiveNow`; (6) 30s interval re-fetches; (7) on API error: counts silently drop, static labels shown
areas.seams: Third concurrent poll against same endpoint â€” negligible cost; must not block render

areas.label: **Triage decisions**
areas.trigger: Operator expands card â†’ takes action
areas.flow: Identical to current flow: card expand â†’ do/defer/decline/mark-done/snooze/bulk â†’ POST to decision/operator-action endpoint â†’ ledger write â†’ optimistic UI update. Cards re-skinned to dark glassmorphism but all button placement and state machine unchanged
areas.seams: Cards must visually distinguish pending/error states in dark context â€” verify in TASK-05 smoke test
